description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

v1.39.0

You can now collect shops with "likes" and "favorites", and we've improved search and time display.

• Like (👍) or favorite (❤️) shops — Rate each shop with a single tap in the community favorites section. You can collect shops you're interested in with 👍 without logging in, and when you log in, they carry over to your ❤️ favorite shops
• Filter by "just mine" — In the community favorites section, you can narrow down to only shops you've liked/favorited (your choices are saved on your device)
• Cleaner filters — Operating hours, distance, sort order, and other options are now grouped under "🔍 Filter" so you can see the full list at a glance
• Correct times for events and operating hours — Fixed UTC offset issues. Operating hours, open/closed status, and event times now display in the local time of each shop's location (supports shops overseas too)
• Today's events don't disappear — Fixed a bug where events that had already started today or all-day events were vanishing from the list
• Search now works with Google Maps links — Paste a map share link, URL, or place ID and find that shop in search
